import { identity } from './identity'; export function pipe() { var fns = []; for (var _i = 0; _i < arguments.length; _i++) { fns[_i] = arguments[_i]; } return pipeFromArray(fns); } export function pipeFromArray(fns) { if (fns.length === 0) { return identity; } if (fns.length === 1) { return fns[0]; } return function piped(input) { return fns.reduce(function (prev, fn) { return fn(prev); }, input); }; } //# sourceMappingURL=pipe.js.map
